full_description: stack three blocks in RGB order with visibility phases (R only, then G only, then RGB)
schema: {A} notifies the red block, {B} notifies the green block, {C} notifies the blue block, {a} notifies the arm for {A}, {b} notifies the arm for {B}, {c} notifies the arm for {C}
preference: num of words should not exceed 22. Degree of detail avg 8
seen: Use {a} for {A}, then {b} for {B}, then {c} for {C}; stack in RGB order.
Move {A} by {a}, stack {B} by {b}, and place {C} by {c} on top.

Use {a} on {A}, {b} on {B}, and {c} on {C} to build RGB stack.
Stack {A}, {B}, {C} in order using {a}, {b}, and {c} at center.

Place {A} by {a}, then {B} by {b}, and {C} by {c} on top.
Use {a} to move {A}, {b} to move {B}, and {c} to move {C} centrally.
Arrange {A}, {B}, {C} in RGB order via {a}, {b}, and {c}.

Use {a}, {b}, {c} to place {A}, {B}, {C} in order at center.

{a} handles {A}, {b} handles {B}, {c} handles {C}; finish RGB tower.
Place {A}, {B}, {C} sequentially at center by {a}, {b}, and {c}.
Use {a} for {A}, {b} for {B}, and {c} for {C} to build one stack.
Pick and stack {A}, {B}, {C} in sequence with {a}, {b}, and {c}.
